hook.text: BARCA QUIT AND BAYERN WANT RASHFORD NOW

beats.text: BARCELONA DECLINED THE PERMANENT £26M BUY OPTION
BAYERN MUNICH ARE WILLING TO PAY £34.5M
UNITED WON'T LET RASHFORD GO ON LOAN AGAIN
FATE DECIDED AS THE WINDOW OPENS JUNE 15

caption: Huge twist in the Rashford saga — Barcelona have declined to trigger the £26m permanent option, with Anthony Gordon's arrival changing Flick's plans. Now Bayern Munich are willing to pay United £34.5m. United won't accept another loan. Window opens June 15. What next for Rashford? 🔴 REPORTED — per Football365 / Sky Sports.
